issue_title: Replies add myself as recipient in these two cases and it should not
issue_body_preview:
### Two situations

- Click on the reply button on an email twice with 3 seconds difference
- Click on the reply button on an email where the last message is your reply to someone

### Expected behavior

- [ ] I would never want to reply to myself alone

### Actual behavior

In some cases
test_description_zh:
1. 打开一封收到的邮件，点击回复按钮，等待约3秒后再次点击回复按钮，检查收件人字段中的地址列表。
2. 打开一封邮件对话，其中最后一条消息是自己回复给他人的，点击回复按钮，检查收件人字段中的地址列表。
expected_result_zh: 在上述两种情况下，回复邮件的收件人字段中不应包含自己的邮箱地址，收件人应为原始发件人或对话中的其他参与者。
